title: Tree Giant
description: Adds many different giant biome-specific trees to the world
body:
Update 2.0.0:

Birch tree update - Bugfixes! + 1.21.1/ 1.21.4
![Birch Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43f8d7804b388d3919398b451beab1fe4c7722cf.png)
## Overview:

Tree Giant is a Minecraft modification aims to add giant trees. Respective creative items included.
Each giant tree will generate in its specific biome.

![Trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbb4608bc53fe2cd820830067e96b132c4e450b9.png)

Credit:

Written by Taknax and Leonxkingx
